name: Claw-Mem: Persistent Memory
description: OpenClaw skill: persistent semantic memory (chat + tool capture, FTS5 search, hybrid recall, context injection). COC node lifecycle moved to @chainofclaw/node; soul backup to @chainofclaw/soul. Both are optional companions — claw-mem works fully on its own.

skipTools.description: Tool names whose after_tool_call events the observer skips entirely.

chatMemory.description: Capture observations from chat messages (in addition to tool calls). Fires on message_received (user) and optionally message_sent (assistant).

explicitOnly.description: Only capture when an explicit cue matches (suppresses preference + plain capture).

captureAssistant.description: Also capture assistant messages (commitments / decisions) via message_sent. Off by default to avoid noise.

minChars.description: Drop messages shorter than this many characters as chitchat.

maxNarrativeChars.description: Truncate the captured narrative body at this many characters.

cues.description: Cue dictionaries that promote messages above the noise floor.

contextRecall.description: How before_prompt_build assembles the injected context.

mode.description: recent = chronological tail only; hybrid = FTS5 search on the latest user message merged with the recent tail.

searchLimitRatio.description: Fraction of maxObservations reserved for search hits in hybrid mode (rest is recent).

summarizer.description: Session-summary backend. Default uses the host OpenClaw inference surface (no extra API key needed).
